title: Leaves Tweaks
description: Adds the ability to craft and crossbread for leaves
body:
# Leaves Tweaks Datapack

*Elevate your Minecraft landscapes with Leaves Tweaks, a datapack crafted to redefine your interaction with leaves in the game. Say goodbye to the conventional methods - now you can craft a variety of leaves with a simple combination of items.*

## Crafting Recipe Example: Bonemeal + Leaf Block = 3 Leaves

![jungle leave](https://i.ibb.co/6YtfZV1/jungle-leave-recipe.png)
![oak leave](https://i.ibb.co/s1mXQFb/oak-leave-recipe.png)
![spruce leave](https://i.ibb.co/h7PScXm/spruce-leave-recipe.png)
![acacia leave](https://i.ibb.co/zXBHHCJ/acacia-leave-recipe.png)

### How to Use:
1. Download the Foliage Tweaks Datapack.
2. Place the downloaded file into the "datapacks" folder in your Minecraft world save.
3. Start crafting and bring new life to your Minecraft trees!

### Compatibility:
- No additional dependencies required.

### Transform Your Environment:
Immerse yourself in a world where vibrant foliage is just a craft away. Leaves Tweaks empowers you to customize your surroundings effortlessly, whether you're a seasoned builder or a casual player. Craft, decorate, and let your creativity flourish!
